---
name: Safe scope request
about: Request a scope discussion without sharing financial or personal data
title: "Scope request: "
labels: [scope-request]
---

## Safe context only

Do **not** include bank exports, account numbers, credentials, customer names, payment references, transaction descriptions, or other personal/financial data.

## Your goal

What exception or reconciliation question should the audit answer?

## CSV shape

List only column *headers* and date/decimal conventions. Do not paste rows.

## Expected-payment list

Which fields exist? For example: label, expected amount, due date, optional match hint.

## Deliverable

- [ ] Reconciliation audit/report
- [ ] Reusable local script/config
- [ ] Integration discussion

## Confirmation

- [ ] I understand this public issue is not a secure data-transfer channel.
